languages.text: "Гипотетически, если у меня в покоях перегорит люмен, твоя гальваническая батарея сможет его оживить?"
"Hypothetically, if a lumen burned out in my chambers, could your galvanic cell revive it?"
languages.original_text: "Гипотетически, если у меня в покоях перегорит люмен, твоя гальваническая батарея сможет его оживить?"

traits.locale_text: "Hypothetically, if a lumen burned out in my chambers, could your galvanic cell revive it?"
"Hypothetically, if a lumen burned out in my chambers, could your galvanic cell revive it?"
"Hypothetically, if a lumen burned out in my chambers, could your galvanic cell revive it?"

languages.text: «Hipotéticamente, si se apagara un lumen en mis aposentos, ¿podría revivirlo con su célula galvánica?».
languages.original_text: "Hypothetically, if a lumen burned out in my chambers, could your galvanic cell revive it?"

traits.locale_text: «Hipotéticamente, si se apagara un lumen en mis aposentos, ¿podría revivirlo con su célula galvánica?».

languages.text: “假设我房间里的流明灯烧了，你那块原电池能把它重新点亮吗？”
languages.original_text: "Hypothetically, if a lumen burned out in my chambers, could your galvanic cell revive it?"

traits.locale_text: “假设我房间里的流明灯烧了，你那块原电池能把它重新点亮吗？”

languages.text: « Imaginons un instant qu'un lumen vienne à s'éteindre dans mes quartiers ; votre cellule galvanique pourrait-elle le rallumer ? »
languages.original_text: "Hypothetically, if a lumen burned out in my chambers, could your galvanic cell revive it?"

traits.locale_text: « Imaginons un instant qu'un lumen vienne à s'éteindre dans mes quartiers ; votre cellule galvanique pourrait-elle le rallumer ? »

languages.text: "Angenommen in meinen Gemächern wäre ein Lumen ausgebrannt ... könnte es Eure galvanische Zelle reaktivieren?"
languages.original_text: "Hypothetically, if a lumen burned out in my chambers, could your galvanic cell revive it?"

traits.locale_text: "Angenommen in meinen Gemächern wäre ein Lumen ausgebrannt ... könnte es Eure galvanische Zelle reaktivieren?"

languages.text: 「仮に、私のチャンバーでルーメンが燃え尽きてしまったとしたら、あなたのガルバニックセルで復活させることができるだろうか？」
languages.original_text: "Hypothetically, if a lumen burned out in my chambers, could your galvanic cell revive it?"

traits.locale_text: 「仮に、私のチャンバーでルーメンが燃え尽きてしまったとしたら、あなたのガルバニックセルで復活させることができるだろうか？」

languages.text: "Varsayımsal olarak konuşuyorum... Kamaralarımda bir lümen yansa galvaniz hücren onu canlandırabilir mi?"
languages.original_text: "Hypothetically, if a lumen burned out in my chambers, could your galvanic cell revive it?"

traits.locale_text: "Varsayımsal olarak konuşuyorum... Kamaralarımda bir lümen yansa galvaniz hücren onu canlandırabilir mi?"
